events.text: You step into your new city for the first time. Shop signs greet you with {greeting}, and {transportMode} routes crisscross streets you do not yet know.

events.text: Exam pressure and family expectations pile up until you cannot sleep. A friend whispers that plenty of people quit and still made something of themselves.

events.text: You find a thick wallet on a bench with no owner in sight. Cash and ID cards peek out from the fold.

events.text: On a crowded street you see someone slip a phone from a stranger's pocket and melt into the crowd.

events.text: The platform flags your account for community guideline review. A ban would wipe years of work.
